text.title: Retargeting / Remarketing Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree on observable signals. Every leaf points to a rule id from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Pixel firing AND segments ≥1000 AND exclusions seeded AND existing frequency ≤5?

text.example: preconds=true → ship 5-tier intent ladder with per-stage freq cap + 25% spend share.
